verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Your glory is tangible in this place, Lord, your doing something great Awaken supernatural faith.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Yahweh, Rafa, Elohim, Shaddai, Jireh, Adonai, Will manifest Himself.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you worship, He will manifest, If you call Him, He will manifest, If you seek Him, He will manifest.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Yahweh will manifest Himself, Jireh will manifest Himself, Rapha will manifest Himself, Will manifest Himself.
